title: inula engleriana
intro: Inula engleriana, also known as the Golden Samos or Yellow Samos, is a medicinal plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. Inula engleriana is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Inula engleriana include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to topical creams and ointments.
